tasks.label: Expo: Run Android
tasks.detail: Runs `npm run android` – builds the native project and launches the dev client on a connected device or emulator.

tasks.label: Expo: Pre‑build (clean)
tasks.detail: Generates native Android/iOS projects (used after SDK changes).

tasks.label: Gemini: Run CLI Command
tasks.detail: Shortcut to run any Gemini CLI command – edit the args array as needed.
